title: gastrochilus micranthus
intro: Gastrochilus micranthus, also known as the dwarf orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Gastrochilus micranthus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including teas, powders, and capsules, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
